name: Iso11783IL_TIMSetProperty
title: Iso11783IL_TIMSetProperty
syntax: long Iso11783IL_TIMSetProperty(char propertyName[], long value); // form 1
description: Sets a property of the TIM server/client.

parameters.name: Properties
parameters.description: Value Range Default value server Default value client Description

parameters.name: isServerMaster
parameters.description: 0..1 0 — 1: TIM server is TIM server master 0: TIM server is no TIM server master

parameters.name: bootTime
parameters.description: 0..255 [seconds] 1 — Boot time which is reported in the TIM_ServerVersionResponse message.

parameters.name: minimumVersion
parameters.description: 0..255 0 0 Minimum TIM version number of the TIM client/server

parameters.name: implementedVersion
parameters.description: 0..255 0 0 Implemented TIM version number of the TIM client/server

parameters.name: deactivateCertificateValidation
parameters.description: 0..FFh 0 0 Bit 0 = 1: Validation of Conformance Certification information against device certificate is deactivated. The parameter group ‘ISOBUS Compliance Certification’ is not requested. Bit 1 = 1: Validation of ISOBUS device name (NAME) against device certificate is deactivated. Bit 2 = 1: Validation of function capabilities against the certificates is deactivated. Bit 3 = 1: Check for revoked certificates is deactivated. Bit 4 = 1: Check for certificate type (client or server certificate) is deactivated.

parameters.name: enableDemoMode
parameters.description: 0..1 0 0 1: Demo mode is enabled. Therefore no certificates and keys are validated 0: Demo mode is disabled

parameters.name: useRequestCounter
parameters.description: 0..1 0 0 1: Increment request counter (starting with 0) in function request messages 0: Request counter is not used when function request messages are sent
